meaning: n.(瀛︿綅)璁烘枃,涓撻,璁鸿堪,瀛︽湳婕旇
examples: I'm working my notes up into a dissertation.
He is currently writing a dissertation on the Somali civil war.
I'm supposed to have handed in a first draft of my dissertation.
Her university dissertation was on Marina Tsvetaeva, a poet then in deep official disfavour.
That said, I have 10, 000 word dissertation in for next Friday, which I've yet to start.
